welcome.title: Crea siti web con l'AI.
welcome.subtitle: Nessun codice richiesto.
welcome.description: Crea, modifica e pubblica siti multipagina usando il linguaggio naturale e un builder visuale. Un solo account, più progetti.
welcome.featuresTitle: Tutto ciò che ti serve per partire
welcome.feature1Desc: Genera interi siti o modifica sezioni con il linguaggio naturale.
welcome.feature2Desc: Sezioni drag-and-drop, editor delle proprietà e anteprima in tempo reale.
welcome.feature3Desc: Vai online con il nostro hosting o scarica l'HTML statico.
welcome.everything_in: Tutto ciò che è incluso in {{plan}}

rtl.title: Anteprima RTL
rtl.description: Questa pagina è visualizzata con layout da destra a sinistra. Usa il selettore della lingua per passare all'arabo (العربية) e vedere l'intera app in RTL.
rtl.ltrNote: Torna all'inglese o al bengalese per il layout LTR.

admin.gateway_enable_desc: Rendi questo gateway disponibile per il checkout

admin.stripe_webhook_hint: Segreto di firma del webhook (whsec_…) dalla dashboard Stripe
admin.webhook_hint: Segreto webhook usato per verificare gli eventi in arrivo dal gateway
admin.feature_list_hint: es. Fino a 10 membri del team, Supporto prioritario, Branding white-label
admin.slug_auto_hint: Lascia vuoto per generarlo automaticamente dal nome

locales.no_languages: Nessuna lingua. Aggiungine una qui sopra.
locales.remove_language: Rimuovere questa lingua? Le traduzioni per questa lingua rimarranno nel database.
locales.no_translations: Nessuna traduzione corrisponde ai filtri. Esegui i18n:seed-defaults per popolare.

auth.confirm_password_intro: Questa è un'area protetta dell'applicazione. Conferma la tua password prima di continuare.
auth.forgot_password_intro: Hai dimenticato la password? Nessun problema. Indicaci il tuo indirizzo email e ti invieremo un link per reimpostarla e sceglierne una nuova.
auth.name: Nome
auth.verify_email_intro: Grazie per esserti registrato! Prima di iniziare, potresti verificare il tuo indirizzo email cliccando sul link che ti abbiamo appena inviato? Se non hai ricevuto l'email, saremo lieti di inviartene un'altra.
auth.verification_sent: Un nuovo link di verifica è stato inviato all'indirizzo email fornito durante la registrazione.
auth.resend_verification: Invia di nuovo l'email di verifica
auth.admin_tagline: Gestisci la tua piattaforma con sicurezza
auth.tagline: Trasforma le conversazioni in ricavi — con il pilota automatico
auth.admin_sub: Controllo completo su clienti, abbonamenti, integrazioni e impostazioni.
auth.sub: Unisciti a migliaia di team che usano l'AI per automatizzare il supporto, coltivare i lead e chiudere le trattative più velocemente.
auth.feature1: Automatizza le attività ripetitive e recupera oltre 10 ore a settimana
auth.feature2: Aumenta i tassi di risposta fino a 3 volte con messaggi creati dall'AI
auth.feature3: Chatbot attivi 24/7 che qualificano i lead mentre dormi
auth.admin_feature1: Accesso granulare basato sui ruoli per ogni membro del team
auth.admin_feature2: Gestisci clienti, piani e fatturazione da un'unica dashboard
auth.admin_feature3: Registri di controllo in tempo reale e monitoraggio live della coda
auth.login_subtitle: Inserisci le tue credenziali per continuare
auth.demo_one_click_hint: Esplora un account completamente popolato — nessuna registrazione richiesta.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Scegli una nuova password per il tuo account
auth.two_factor_subtitle: Inserisci il codice a 6 cifre dalla tua app di autenticazione, oppure uno dei tuoi codici di recupero.
auth.magic_link_subtitle: Inserisci la tua email e ti invieremo un link di accesso sicuro.
auth.google_signin_failed: Accesso con Google non riuscito. Riprova.
auth.testimonial_quote: "Abbiamo ridotto i tempi di risposta dell'80% e raddoppiato le conversioni di vendita nel primo mese."
auth.testimonial_role: Head of Growth, negozio Shopify · 12k ordini/mese

profile.delete_account_intro: Una volta eliminato il tuo account, tutte le sue risorse e i suoi dati verranno eliminati definitivamente. Prima di eliminare l'account, scarica i dati e le informazioni che desideri conservare.
profile.delete_account_confirm: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare il tuo account? Una volta eliminato, tutte le sue risorse e i suoi dati verranno rimossi definitivamente. Inserisci la tua password per confermare.
profile.update_password_intro: Assicurati che il tuo account utilizzi una password lunga e casuale per rimanere al sicuro.
profile.profile_information_intro: Aggiorna le informazioni del profilo e l'indirizzo email del tuo account.
profile.email_unverified: Il tuo indirizzo email non è verificato. <resend>Clicca qui per inviare di nuovo l'email di verifica.</resend>
profile.verification_link_sent: Un nuovo link di verifica è stato inviato al tuo indirizzo email.
profile.revoke_password_label: Inserisci la tua password per revocare tutte le altre sessioni
profile.two_factor_enabled_desc: L'autenticazione a due fattori è attualmente abilitata per il tuo account.
profile.two_factor_disabled_desc: Aggiungi un ulteriore livello di sicurezza al tuo account usando un'app di autenticazione TOTP (es. Google Authenticator, Authy).
profile.two_factor_scan_instructions: Scansiona questo codice QR con la tua app di autenticazione, poi inserisci il codice a 6 cifre per confermare.
profile.two_factor_disable_warning: Disabilitare la 2FA renderà il tuo account meno sicuro.

demo.banner: Modalità demo: le modifiche sono disabilitate.

subscription.proration_note: Eventuali conguagli verranno applicati immediatamente. La tua prossima fattura rifletterà le modifiche.
subscription.checkout_success: Pagamento riuscito. Il tuo abbonamento è attivo.

campaign.title: Campagne
campaign.empty_desc: Crea la tua prima campagna broadcast per inviare messaggi ai tuoi contatti.
campaign.no_recipients_desc: I destinatari appariranno qui quando la campagna inizierà l'invio.
campaign.from_name_placeholder: Acme Marketing (usa il valore SMTP predefinito se vuoto)
campaign.from_email_placeholder: hello@acme.com (usa il valore SMTP predefinito se vuoto)
campaign.open_tracking_desc: Incorpora un pixel invisibile per rilevare quando un destinatario apre l'email.
campaign.click_tracking_desc: Incapsula i link nel corpo dell'email così i clic vengono registrati prima del reindirizzamento.
campaign.no_segments_hint: Nessun segmento. Creane uno da Contatti → Segmenti.
campaign.no_tags_hint: Nessun tag. Aggiungi tag da Contatti.
campaign.csv_path: Percorso CSV sul disco di archiviazione
campaign.csv_hint: Carica prima il tuo CSV sul disco di archiviazione. La riga di intestazione deve includere
campaign.csv_no_preview: Il CSV verrà elaborato al lancio della campagna; nessuna anteprima disponibile.
campaign.opted_in_for: hanno acconsentito per {{channel}} e sono raggiungibili.
campaign.no_templates_synced: Nessun modello sincronizzato. Sincronizzali dalla pagina Modelli WhatsApp.
campaign.no_variables: Questo modello non ha variabili da compilare.
campaign.sms_body_placeholder: Ciao {{contact.first_name}}, il tuo ordine è in arrivo!
campaign.schedule_help: Lascia vuoto per inviare non appena premi Avvia dalla pagina della campagna. L'orario inserito viene interpretato nel fuso orario selezionato qui sotto.
campaign.send_test_desc: Invia un messaggio personalizzato usando la bozza attuale per verificare che tutto venga visualizzato correttamente.
campaign.intl_number_hint: I numeri internazionali richiedono + e il prefisso del paese (es. +14155552671)
campaign.subject: Oggetto
campaign.variables_hint: Le variabili appaiono come <field>[Campo]</field>. Ogni destinatario riceve il proprio valore.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.endpoints_subtitle: Ricevi eventi in tempo reale dal tuo account
webhook.rotate_confirm: Ruotare il segreto? Il vecchio segreto di firma verrà invalidato immediatamente.
webhook.listening_all: In ascolto su tutti gli eventi
webhook.new_secret_notice: Nuovo segreto di firma (copialo ora — mostrato una sola volta):

reports.ai_subtitle: Analisi di consumo token, costi e latenza
reports.automation_subtitle: Volume di esecuzioni, ripartizione per stato e analisi degli errori
reports.inbox_subtitle: Volume delle conversazioni, distribuzione canali e metriche degli agenti
reports.social_subtitle: Volume dei post, distribuzione per rete e attività recente
reports.no_ai_runs: Nessuna esecuzione AI in questo periodo
reports.no_assigned_conversations: Nessuna conversazione assegnata in questo periodo

pusher.title: Impostazioni Pusher
pusher.config_desc: Configura le credenziali Pusher per abilitare le funzionalità in tempo reale. Le impostazioni salvate qui hanno la precedenza su .env.
pusher.enable_pusher_desc: Attiva il broadcasting in tempo reale in tutta l'applicazione
pusher.app_id_hint: Si trova nella tua dashboard Pusher
pusher.app_key_hint: Chiave pubblica — può essere esposta al frontend
pusher.app_secret_hint: Conservato in forma crittografata. Lascia ••••••• per mantenere quello attuale.
pusher.step_1: Accedi a pusher.com e apri la tua app.
pusher.step_2: Vai su App Keys nella barra laterale.
pusher.step_3: Copia app_id, key, secret e il cluster.

cron.title: Configurazione cron
cron.heading: Configurazione cron e scheduler
cron.subheading: Configura il tuo server per eseguire le attività pianificate ed elaborare i job in background.
cron.status_active_desc: Lo scheduler è stato eseguito {{time}}. Tutto sembra in ordine.
cron.status_stale_desc: L'ultima esecuzione dello scheduler risale a {{time}} — potrebbe essere in ritardo. Verifica che il servizio cron sia in esecuzione.
cron.status_inactive_desc: Nessuna attività dello scheduler rilevata finora. Aggiungi la voce cron qui sotto, poi attendi fino a un minuto perché venga registrata.
cron.step1_desc: Aggiungi questa singola riga al crontab del tuo server (esegui "crontab -e"). Attiva lo scheduler ogni minuto, che a sua volta avvia tutte le attività qui sotto.
cron.step2_desc: I job in background — campagne, messaggi, post social — vengono eseguiti su code. Avvia un worker persistente e usa Supervisor in produzione per mantenerlo attivo e riavviarlo automaticamente.
cron.supervisor_desc: Salva come /etc/supervisor/conf.d/wisperbot-worker.conf, poi esegui: supervisorctl reread && supervisorctl update.
cron.step3_desc: Esegui questi comandi per confermare che lo scheduler e la coda siano collegati correttamente.
cron.verify_run: Attiva immediatamente tutte le attività pianificate in scadenza:
cron.verify_list: Elenca ogni attività pianificata registrata e la sua prossima esecuzione:
cron.tasks_desc: Queste attività sono registrate nell'app e vengono eseguite automaticamente una volta attiva la voce cron qui sopra.

settings.site_info_desc: Utilizzate in tutta l'applicazione e nelle email
settings.appearance_desc: Colori del brand applicati in tutta l'interfaccia
settings.logo_favicon_desc: Visualizzati nella barra di navigazione, nelle email e nella scheda del browser
settings.app_logo_desc: Visualizzato nella barra laterale e nelle intestazioni delle email. Consigliato: PNG o SVG, almeno 200×60 px.
settings.favicon_desc: Mostrata nelle schede del browser. Consigliato: ICO, PNG o SVG, 32×32 o 64×64 px.
settings.logo_usage_hint: Il logo è visualizzato nell'intestazione della barra laterale admin, nella navigazione lato cliente, nelle pagine di marketing e nei modelli email. La favicon è mostrata nelle schede del browser e nei segnalibri. Le modifiche hanno effetto immediato al successivo caricamento della pagina.
settings.no_advanced_desc: Aggiungi coppie chiave-valore tramite seeding o via codice usando SystemSetting::set().
settings.firebase_auth_desc: Abilita l'accesso con Google tramite Firebase. Ottieni questi valori dalla console del tuo progetto Firebase in Impostazioni progetto → Generali → Le tue app.
settings.enable_firebase_desc: Mostra il pulsante "Continua con Google" nella pagina di accesso
settings.firebase_step_1: Nella console Firebase, abilita Google in Authentication → Metodi di accesso.
settings.firebase_step_2: Aggiungi il tuo dominio ai Domini autorizzati nelle impostazioni di Firebase Authentication.
settings.firebase_step_3: Compila i campi qui sopra e attiva l'interruttore.
settings.firebase_api_key_desc: Chiave API Web dalle impostazioni del progetto Firebase
settings.notif_subtitle: Scegli quali notifiche ricevere e come. Le notifiche in-app sono sempre attive.
settings.notif_event_new_message_desc: Quando un contatto invia un nuovo messaggio in entrata
settings.notif_event_mention_desc: Quando un collega ti menziona in una nota interna
settings.notif_event_campaign_completed_desc: Quando una campagna broadcast termina l'invio
settings.notif_event_automation_failed_desc: Quando un'esecuzione di automazione incontra un errore
settings.notif_event_billing_failed_desc: Quando un pagamento fallisce e richiede attenzione
settings.push_unavailable: Web push non disponibile. Consenti le notifiche per questo sito nel tuo browser e assicurati che il push sia configurato sul server.
settings.push_enable_error: Impossibile abilitare il web push: {{error}}. Il server potrebbe non avere le chiavi VAPID.
settings.push_permission_hint: Il Web Push richiede l'autorizzazione del browser. Vedrai una richiesta del browser alla prima attivazione.
settings.timezone_hint: Usato per la programmazione di campagne e post in tutto il tuo account.
settings.weekly_digest_label: Ricevi il riepilogo settimanale delle prestazioni ogni lunedì alle 9

ecommerce.title: Negozi e-commerce
ecommerce.subtitle: Collega Shopify o WooCommerce per sincronizzare i clienti, tracciare gli ordini e attivare automazioni sugli eventi commerciali.
ecommerce.bc_install_hint: Installa l'app dal pannello di controllo BigCommerce (Apps → My Apps). Verrai reindirizzato qui automaticamente una volta autorizzata.
ecommerce.products_sub: Prodotti sincronizzati e livelli di scorte in tempo reale dai tuoi negozi collegati.
ecommerce.orders_sub: Ordini sincronizzati dai tuoi negozi collegati.
ecommerce.search_orders: Cerca per n° ordine o cliente…
ecommerce.fulfill_hint: Invia al negozio uno stato di evasione/spedizione. Il webhook del negozio confermerà e potrebbe attivare la tua automazione di spedizione.

integrations.title: Integrazioni
integrations.subtitle: Tutte le credenziali di terze parti sono conservate crittografate nel database. Nessuna modifica a .env necessaria.
integrations.no_audit_entries: Ancora nessuna voce nel registro attività.
integrations.callback_url_desc: Registra esattamente questo URL nelle impostazioni dell'app della tua piattaforma.
integrations.storage_local_banner: L'archiviazione locale usa il disco pubblico del server. Non servono credenziali. Abilitala per usare i caricamenti di file in locale.
integrations.storage_remote_banner: Solo un provider di archiviazione può essere attivo alla volta. Abilitando questo, diventerà la destinazione attiva dei caricamenti per l'intera applicazione. Il campo Prefisso directory ti permette di raggruppare tutti i caricamenti in una sottocartella (es. myapp/uploads).
integrations.rotate_confirm: Ruotare il segreto del webhook? Il vecchio segreto non funzionerà più.
integrations.no_credentials_local: Nessuna credenziale necessaria per l'archiviazione locale. Basta abilitare l'integrazione qui sopra.
integrations.encrypted_note: I valori sono conservati crittografati. I campi mascherati (••••) verranno mantenuti così come sono se lasciati invariati.
integrations.config_id_conflict: Conflitto di Config ID: i Config ID di WhatsApp e Social (Instagram/Messenger) sono identici. Devono essere configurazioni diverse, create separatamente in Meta App Dashboard → Facebook Login for Business → Configurations. Usare lo stesso Config ID farà sì che la registrazione integrata di Instagram/Messenger mostri i permessi di WhatsApp.

support_tickets.title: Ticket di supporto
support_tickets.subtitle: Ricevi aiuto dal nostro team
support_tickets.admin_subtitle: Gestisci i ticket di supporto dei clienti
support_tickets.response_time: Di solito rispondiamo entro poche ore
support_tickets.no_tickets_desc: Invia un ticket e il nostro team ti risponderà a breve.
support_tickets.no_tickets_admin_desc: Nessun ticket di supporto è stato ancora inviato
support_tickets.message_placeholder: Descrivi il tuo problema in dettaglio. Includi i passaggi per riprodurlo, i messaggi di errore o le descrizioni degli screenshot...
support_tickets.tips_title: Consigli per un supporto più rapido
support_tickets.tip_1: Descrivi i passaggi per riprodurre il problema
support_tickets.tip_2: Includi eventuali messaggi di errore che vedi
support_tickets.tip_3: Indica il tuo browser o dispositivo se pertinente
support_tickets.reply_placeholder: Descrivi la tua domanda o fornisci ulteriori informazioni...
support_tickets.reply_placeholder_admin: Scrivi la tua risposta al cliente...
support_tickets.reply_visible: Questa risposta sarà visibile al cliente
support_tickets.admin_create_subtitle: Log a ticket on behalf of a customer
support_tickets.admin_create_note: The customer will be emailed a confirmation with this ticket. Leave the customer blank to enter name and email manually.

landing_page_admin.master_toggle_on: The landing page and marketing pages are publicly visible.
landing_page_admin.master_toggle_off: Disabled — visitors to the landing and marketing pages are redirected to the login page.
landing_page_admin.page_subtitle: Manage every section of the public marketing website — home, About, Integrations, SEO and more.
landing_page_admin.badge_text_hint: Small pill above headline (leave empty to hide)

landing_page_admin.question: Question

landing_page_admin.seo_description_hint: Shown under the title in search results (~155 chars).
landing_page_admin.seo_og_image_hint: Absolute URL of the og:image (1200×630 recommended).

landing_page_admin.integrations_strip_hint: The logo chips shown here are pulled from the integrations listed on the Integrations Page tab.
landing_page_admin.about_story_hint: Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

email_server.title: Email Server
email_server.subtitle: Configure your SMTP server for email broadcasting campaigns. If not set, the platform default will be used.
email_server.enable_smtp: Enable this SMTP for outgoing email campaigns
email_server.send_test_desc: Verify your SMTP configuration by sending a test email.
email_server.how_tip_1: Your workspace SMTP is used for all email campaigns.
email_server.how_tip_2: Only contacts with a valid email and email opt-in will receive messages.
email_server.remove_confirm: Remove this email server configuration? Email campaigns will fall back to the platform default.

landing.footer_tagline: The all-in-one WhatsApp marketing & automation platform. Automate, engage, and grow.

ai_dashboard.title: AI Dashboard
ai_dashboard.subtitle: System-wide AI usage, provider health, and vector store status.
ai_dashboard.mysql_fallback: MySQL fallback is fully functional. Qdrant is optional for scale (>50k chunks).

coupons.subtitle: Manage discount coupons for your plans
coupons.no_coupons: No coupons yet. Create one to get started.

email_system.no_smtp_desc: Click "Add Configuration" to set up your mail server.
email_system.test_sent_success: Test email sent successfully! Check your inbox.

onboarding.title: Getting Started
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to get the most out of your account.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.transparent: Simple, transparent pricing. No hidden fees.
pricing.payment_success: Payment successful. Your subscription is active.
pricing.choose_plan_anytime: Choose the plan that fits your business. Upgrade or cancel anytime.
pricing.choose_plan_no_fees: Choose the plan that fits your business. No hidden fees. Upgrade or cancel anytime.
pricing.money_back: All paid plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked.
pricing.ready_to_start_desc: No credit card required. Free plan available.

data_export.title: Data Export
data_export.subtitle: Download a full copy of your workspace data in CSV format, as required by GDPR and similar privacy regulations.
data_export.manifest: Manifest with record counts & generation date
data_export.privacy_security_desc: Your export is processed securely. You'll receive an email with a private download link that expires after 72 hours.

api.tokens_subtitle: Personal access tokens for the REST API
api.scopes_intro_before: When creating a token you can grant it a specific subset of permissions. Tokens with
api.scope_conversations_read: Read inbox conversations and message threads
api.scope_webhooks_write: Register and remove outbound webhook endpoints
api.scope_ai_read: Read AI chatbots and knowledge bases
api.scope_ai_write: Invoke chatbots and manage knowledge base documents
api.ep_contacts_list: Cursor-paginated list; filter by segment_id, tag, search, opt_in_whatsapp
api.ep_contacts_get: Get a single contact with tags
api.ep_campaigns_list: List campaigns; filter by channel, status
api.ep_campaigns_get: Get campaign detail with fresh stats
api.ep_messages_send: Send a single outbound message to a contact (WhatsApp / SMS)
api.ep_conversations_list: List conversations; filter by channel, status, assigned_to
api.ep_ai_chatbots_chat: Invoke chatbot with a message; runs RAG and returns reply
api.ep_kb_add_doc: Add a document (URL / text / file upload)
api.ep_automations_trigger: Manually fire an automation for a contact
api.ep_social_posts: Schedule or publish a social post
api.copy_token_warning: Copy your token now. It won't be shown again.
api.revoke_confirm: Revoke this token? It will stop working immediately.

contacts_page.title: Contacts
contacts_page.bulk_err_no_phone_column: Could not find a Phone column. Use the sample file headers.
contacts_page.bulk_err_unreadable: Could not read that file. Try exporting as .xlsx from Excel or Google Sheets.
contacts_page.bulk_file_hint: Only .xlsx files (read with ExcelJS). Phone numbers must include the country calling code (e.g. +1). The grid uses Handsontable for copy/paste, filters, column resize, row context menu, and fill handle. Download sample file here.
contacts_page.alert_phone_or_email: Please enter at least a phone number or an email address.
contacts_page.empty_description: Use bulk import (.xlsx), import a CSV, or add contacts manually to build your audience.
contacts_page.seg_confirm_remove: Remove this contact from the segment?
contacts_page.seg_manage_subtitle: Manage contacts in this static segment.
contacts_page.seg_empty_current: No contacts yet. Add some from the right.
contacts_page.seg_showing_limit: Showing up to 50 results. Use search to narrow down.
contacts_page.seg_subtitle: Group contacts by rules for targeted campaigns.
contacts_page.seg_empty_description: Create a segment to group contacts by rules for targeted campaigns.
contacts_page.avatar_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF · max 2 MB

ui.cookie_consent_message: We use cookies to improve your experience.
ui.type_to_search: Type at least 2 characters to search…
ui.upgrade_modal_body: Upgrade your plan to continue using this feature. Your current plan does not include enough quota for this action.
ui.tour_welcome_desc: Let's take a quick tour to help you get the most out of your account.
ui.tour_inbox_desc: Manage conversations from WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, SMS, and Email all in one place.
ui.tour_campaigns_desc: Send bulk messages to your contacts via WhatsApp, SMS, or Email.
ui.tour_automation_desc: Build powerful workflows that trigger on events like new contacts or incoming messages.
ui.tour_ai_desc: Train AI chatbots on your knowledge base to handle customer conversations automatically.
ui.tour_done_desc: Explore the sidebar to discover all features. You can always find help in the settings.

inbox_ui.search_contact: Search by name, phone, or email…
inbox_ui.select_channel: Select which channel to start the conversation on:
inbox_ui.opening_message: Type a message to send when the conversation opens…

inbox.whatsapp_freeform_warning: WhatsApp requires the contact to have messaged you first (or use an approved template) for free-form messages to be delivered.
inbox.name_declined_submit_new: Name declined by Meta — submit a new name below
inbox.change_display_name_help: Submit a new display name for Meta to review. Must represent a real business. Review takes a few minutes to 24 hours.
inbox.remove_waba_warning: This removes all phone channel accounts. Existing inbox conversations are kept.
inbox.registered_via_embedded: Registered automatically via Embedded Signup (shared global callback).
inbox.no_phone_numbers: No phone numbers yet — click "Sync from Meta" or reconnect via Embedded Signup.
inbox.could_not_detect_waba: Could not detect your WABA ID from the Meta popup. Please try again.
inbox.authorize_whatsapp_help: Click below to authorize via Meta. Your WhatsApp Business Account and phone numbers will be connected automatically.
inbox.meta_app_not_configured: Meta App is not configured. Ask your administrator to set up the Meta App in Admin → Integrations → Meta App.
inbox.account_remove_warning: Existing conversations are kept; new inbound messages will stop routing.
inbox.embedded_signup_not_configured: Embedded Signup is not configured. Ask your administrator to set the Config ID in Admin → Integrations → Meta App.
inbox.could_not_load_fb_sdk: Could not load Facebook SDK. Please disable any ad blockers and try again.
inbox.authorization_cancelled: Authorization cancelled or failed. Please try again.
inbox.meta_app_social_not_configured: Meta App (Social) is not configured. Ask your administrator to set the Social Config ID in Admin → Integrations → Meta App.
inbox.config_mismatch_instagram: The Social Config ID matches the WhatsApp Config ID. Instagram requires a separate Facebook Login for Business config (Admin → Integrations → Meta App, Step 3).
inbox.authorize_instagram_help: Click below to authorize via Meta. All Instagram Business accounts linked to your Facebook Pages will be connected automatically.
inbox.config_mismatch_messenger: The Social Config ID matches the WhatsApp Config ID. Messenger requires a separate Facebook Login for Business config (Admin → Integrations → Meta App, Step 3).
inbox.authorize_messenger_help: Click below to authorize via Meta. All Facebook Pages you manage will be connected as Messenger channels automatically.
inbox.channel_setup_subtitle: Connect WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger to this workspace.
inbox.to_enable_ai_replies: to enable AI auto-replies on channels.
inbox.getting_started_subtitle: Connect your messaging channels in 3 steps
inbox.step1_desc: Link your WhatsApp, Instagram, or Messenger account using the buttons above.
inbox.step2_desc: Copy the webhook URL into your Meta App Dashboard to receive messages.
inbox.step3_desc: Optionally assign an AI chatbot to auto-reply to incoming messages.
inbox.meta_webhook_help: Use this URL for Instagram & Messenger in Meta App Dashboard → Webhooks.
inbox.no_labels: No labels yet. Create one above.
inbox.no_canned_replies: No canned replies yet. Create one above.
inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.no_conversations_desc: Conversations from WhatsApp, Instagram, and other channels will appear here.
inbox.select_conversation_desc: Choose from the list to start chatting
inbox.no_messages_desc: Messages will appear here once the conversation begins.
inbox.no_internal_notes_desc: Add notes visible only to your team.
inbox.no_orders_desc: This contact has no orders from your connected store yet.
inbox.session_closed_warning: 24-hour session closed — use a WhatsApp template to re-engage this contact.
inbox.session_closed_reengage: Session closed — re-engage with a template first
inbox.session_closed_placeholder: Session closed — select a template above to re-engage
inbox.type_message_placeholder: Type a message… or /shortcut for canned reply

automation.title: Automations
automation.subtitle: Build event-driven workflows with a visual drag-and-drop builder.
automation.test_subtitle: Simulate this workflow — nothing is sent
automation.test_disclaimer: This is a dry run with a sample contact. No messages are sent and no data is changed.
automation.test_failed: The test could not be completed.
automation.ai_subtitle: Describe your workflow in plain language
automation.ai_placeholder: e.g. When a new contact is added, send a WhatsApp welcome message, wait 1 day, then ask how their experience is going.
automation.ai_disclaimer: AI builds a draft on the canvas. Review each step and Save before activating.
automation.ai_failed: AI generation failed. Make sure an AI provider is connected, then try again.
automation.ai_example_welcome: Welcome new contacts with a WhatsApp message, then tag them as onboarded
automation.ai_example_abandoned: Recover abandoned carts: wait 1 hour, send a reminder with the recovery link
automation.ai_example_faq: When someone messages "price", reply with our pricing and ask if they want a demo
automation.delete_node_confirm_body: “{{name}}” and its connections will be removed from the workflow.
automation.delete_nodes_confirm_body: {{count}} steps and their connections will be removed from the workflow.
automation.empty_description: Build event-driven workflows that automatically engage your contacts.
automation.trigger_node_hint: Click the Trigger node on the canvas to choose what starts this automation.
automation.trigger_panel_intro: Choose the event that starts this automation.
automation.placeholder_whatsapp_body: Your WhatsApp message… Use {{token}} for personalization.
automation.placeholder_sms_body: Your SMS message… Use {{token}} for personalization.
automation.condition_yes_hint: condition is true → connects from left handle
automation.condition_no_hint: condition is false → connects from right handle
automation.placeholder_ai_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. Reply to the contact's message in a friendly tone…
automation.channel_meta_hint: Messenger & Instagram can only be messaged inside an existing thread (the contact must have messaged you first).
automation.channel_meta_image_hint: Messenger & Instagram support image media only, and only within an existing thread.
automation.keyword_filter_hint: Only trigger when message contains one of these keywords (comma-separated). Leave blank to trigger on every message.
automation.available_tokens_hint: Use these in message nodes. Requires a connected store under E-Commerce.
automation.google_not_configured: Google Workspace is not connected. Add it under Integrations to use this node.
automation.placeholder_template_vars: One value per line, in order. Tokens allowed: {{contact.name}}
automation.template_not_approved: This template is {{status}} — only APPROVED templates are delivered by WhatsApp.
automation.sequence_hint: Messages are sent in order, top to bottom.
automation.placeholder_quick_replies_body: What would you like to do?
automation.placeholder_list_body: Pick an option from the list…
automation.placeholder_list_rows: One per line. Use Title|Description for an optional subtitle.
automation.ask_question_hint: The contact's next reply is saved and usable later as {{var}}.
automation.no_subflows: No other automations to call yet.
automation.placeholder_chatbot_prompt: Optional opening message if no inbound message exists.
automation.poll_hint: Sent as tappable reply buttons (≤3 options) or an interactive list (4+).
automation.field_send_link: Send the Meet link to the contact
automation.placeholder_form_body: Tap below to open the form.
automation.no_stores: No connected {{platform}} store. Add one under E-Commerce.
automation.placeholder_product_id: Internal ID or external product ID
automation.placeholder_row_values: One cell value per line. Tokens allowed: {{contact.name}}
automation.placeholder_replacements: One per line: key=value. Replaces {{key}} in the doc.
automation.field_send_doc_link: Send the document link to the contact
automation.field_send_form_link: Send the form link to the contact
automation.canvas_hint: Drag nodes from the panel · Click a node to configure · Drag to connect handles · Delete key removes selected

ai.chatbots_subtitle: Create and test AI chatbots powered by your knowledge bases.
ai.chatbots_empty_description: Create an AI chatbot and link it to a knowledge base to handle customer queries automatically.
ai.chatbot_create_hint: You can configure the knowledge base, tone, and system prompt after creating.
ai.playground_empty: Send a message to test your chatbot
ai.system_prompt_placeholder: You are a helpful support assistant…
ai.fallback_reply_placeholder: Sorry, I couldn't find an answer to that.
ai.fallback_reply_hint: Shown when the bot can't find relevant context
ai.kb_subtitle: Train chatbots by uploading documents, URLs, and FAQs.
ai.kb_empty_description: Create a knowledge base and upload documents to train your AI chatbots.
ai.docs_empty_description: Add a URL, upload a file, paste text, or crawl a sitemap to train your chatbot.
ai.sitemap_hint: We'll crawl all pages listed in the sitemap and index them.
ai.provider_settings_subtitle: Add your own API keys to override the platform defaults. Leave blank to use the admin-configured system keys.
ai.no_providers_description: Ask your administrator to configure AI provider credentials, or add your own API keys below.
ai.guide_openai_step1: Go to platform.openai.com and sign in.
ai.guide_openai_step2: Navigate to API Keys → Create new secret key.
ai.guide_openai_step3: Copy the key immediately — it is only shown once.
ai.guide_openai_step4: Add a payment method under Settings → Billing.
ai.guide_openai_step5: Paste the key above and choose a default model.
ai.guide_anthropic_step1: Go to console.anthropic.com and sign in.
ai.guide_anthropic_step2: Navigate to Account Settings → API Keys → Create Key.
ai.guide_anthropic_step3: Copy the key — shown only once.
ai.guide_anthropic_step4: Add a credit card under Billing to activate the API.
ai.guide_anthropic_step5: Paste the key above and choose a default model.
ai.guide_gemini_step1: Go to aistudio.google.com and sign in with Google.
ai.guide_gemini_step2: Click "Get API key" → "Create API key in new project".
ai.guide_gemini_step4: Paste the key above and choose a Gemini model.

whatsapp.setup_subtitle: Connect one or more WhatsApp Business Accounts (WABAs) to this workspace.
whatsapp.setup_phone_not_verified: Phone not verified — Number Verify won't work until verified.
whatsapp.setup_delete_warning: This will remove this WABA and all its channel accounts. Existing inbox conversations are kept but new inbound messages will stop routing.
whatsapp.setup_empty_description: Use the Channel Setup page to connect your WhatsApp Business Account.
whatsapp.setup_webhook_step_1: Go to your Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhooks.
whatsapp.setup_webhook_step_2: Paste the <1>Callback URL</1> from the WABA card above into "Callback URL".
whatsapp.setup_webhook_step_3: Paste the <1>Verify Token</1> into "Verify token", then click <3>Verify and Save</3>.
whatsapp.setup_webhook_step_5: Repeat for each additional WABA (each has its own verify token).
whatsapp.widget_subtitle: Embed a WhatsApp chat bubble on your website.
whatsapp.widget_delete_confirm: Delete this widget? This will stop it from loading on all sites.
whatsapp.widget_empty_description: Create a chat widget to embed a WhatsApp chat bubble on your website.
whatsapp.widget_create_subtitle: Configure a WhatsApp bubble to embed on your website.
whatsapp.widget_create_basic_desc: Set up your widget identity and messaging.
whatsapp.widget_edit_basic_desc: Update your widget identity and messaging.
whatsapp.widget_appearance_desc: Customize how the widget looks on your website.
whatsapp.widget_field_name_hint: Only visible to you — helps identify widgets in the list.
whatsapp.widget_field_prefilled_hint: Opens WhatsApp with this text already typed in.
whatsapp.widget_field_greeting_hint: Auto-shown as a popup card 3 s after page loads. Leave empty to disable.
whatsapp.widget_field_greeting_placeholder: Hi! 👋 How can we help you today?
whatsapp.widget_field_agent_name_hint: Displayed in the greeting card header.
whatsapp.widget_embed_desc: Paste this into your website to activate the widget.
whatsapp.widget_embed_instructions: Add this snippet to your website's <1><head></1> or just before the closing <3></body></3> tag.
whatsapp.widget_install_tip_platforms: Works on any HTML website, WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Wix, etc.
whatsapp.widget_install_tip_async: The <1>async defer</1> attributes ensure it doesn't block page load.
whatsapp.widget_install_tip_cache: Changes to widget settings take effect within 5 minutes (cached).
whatsapp.widget_working_hours_hint: Only show the widget during business hours.
whatsapp.widget_domains_tip: Leave empty to allow the widget on all websites. Add domains to restrict where it loads.
whatsapp.auto_replies_subtitle: Automatically respond to incoming WhatsApp messages by keyword or trigger.
whatsapp.auto_replies_empty_description: Add a rule to automatically respond to incoming WhatsApp messages by keyword or trigger.
whatsapp.auto_replies_reply_text_placeholder: Thank you for messaging us! We'll get back to you shortly.
whatsapp.templates_subtitle: Manage and submit WhatsApp message templates to Meta for approval.
whatsapp.templates_delete_confirm: Delete template “{{name}}”? This removes it from Meta as well and cannot be undone.
whatsapp.templates_empty_description: Create a WhatsApp message template or sync your existing templates from Meta.
whatsapp.templates_phone_select_hint: Select which number this template belongs to.
whatsapp.templates_name_locked_hint: Name cannot be changed after creation.
whatsapp.templates_name_format_hint: Lowercase, letters, numbers and underscores only.
whatsapp.templates_preview_fallback_note: Placeholders fall back to {{token}} until you add example values.
whatsapp.templates_example_required_hint: Provide example values for each placeholder — Meta requires them for template approval.

email_editor.subject: Subject
email_editor.ai_applied: AI-generated content applied. Review and adjust as needed.
email_editor.ai_generator_desc: Describe what you want to send and the AI will write the subject line and body for you.
email_editor.ai_prompt_placeholder: e.g. Write a promotional email announcing 20% off all products for existing customers. Include a countdown — offer expires in 48 hours.
email_editor.ai_footer_note: Uses your workspace AI provider. Content will replace the current subject and body.
email_editor.empty_canvas: Your email is empty. Add a block below to get started.

sms.title: SMS Gateways
sms.subtitle: Configure your SMS provider credentials. Mark one as default to use it for campaigns.

social.composer_subtitle: Write or generate content and publish across multiple networks.
social.ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe what you want to post about…
social.ai_generate_failed: Failed to generate content. Please try again.
social.ai_request_failed: Request failed. Please check your connection and try again.
social.no_media_hint: No media attached. Click "Add media" to upload or paste a URL.
social.preview_empty: Select one or more accounts on the left to see a preview of your post.
social.accounts_subtitle: Connect your social accounts to schedule and publish posts. Multiple profiles per platform are supported.
social.network_desc_facebook: Connect Facebook Pages to schedule posts.
social.network_desc_instagram: Connect Instagram Business accounts via Facebook.
social.network_desc_linkedin: Connect your LinkedIn profile or company page.
social.network_desc_youtube: Connect your YouTube channel to upload videos.
social.network_desc_tiktok: Connect your TikTok account to publish videos.
social.no_accounts_yet_hint: Click "Connect" on any platform above to get started.
social.calendar_subtitle: View and manage your scheduled posts.
social.posts_subtitle: All your scheduled posts, drafts, and publish history.
social.no_posts_description: Compose your first post to get started.
social.edit_post_subtitle: Changes will not re-publish already published content.
social.schedule_draft_hint: (optional — leave blank to save as draft)
social.campaign_topic_placeholder: e.g. Launching our new AI-powered writing assistant — highlight features, user benefits, and a limited-time offer.
social.campaign_goal_placeholder: e.g. Drive sign-ups, increase brand awareness
social.no_connected_accounts: No connected accounts. Connect an account first.
social.select_one_post: Select at least one post to schedule.
social.plan_limit_reached: Plan limit reached. Please upgrade your plan.

leads.title: Lead Scraper
leads.subtitle: Discover businesses from Google Places and push them to your contact list.
leads.no_leads_description: Start a search to discover businesses from Google Places and push them to your contact list.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.subtitle: Switch between workspaces or create a new one.
workspaces.create_new_desc: Separate data between clients or teams.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Have a question, need a demo, or want to talk pricing? Send us a message and our team will get back to you within one business day.
contact_page.subject: Subject
contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us a little about what you need…

faq.still_have_questions_desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is happy to help.
faq.ready_to_try_desc: Start your free trial — no credit card required.

use_cases.head_title: Use Cases — WhatsApp Marketing for Every Industry
use_cases.meta_desc: See how businesses across e-commerce, real estate, education, healthcare and more use our platform to grow with WhatsApp.
use_cases.hero_subtitle: See how businesses across every sector use our platform to automate communication, drive sales, and retain customers.
use_cases.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using WhatsApp to grow customer engagement.
use_cases.step1_desc: Use Cloud API or scan a QR code — no technical skills needed.
use_cases.step2_desc: Upload a CSV, connect a CRM, or collect leads via forms.
use_cases.step3_desc: Build flows, launch campaigns, and let AI handle conversations.
use_cases.ecommerce_desc: Send order confirmations, shipping updates, and abandoned cart reminders directly via WhatsApp. Recover lost sales with automated follow-ups.
use_cases.realestate_desc: Automatically qualify leads, schedule property viewings, and nurture prospects through their buying journey with personalized WhatsApp sequences.
use_cases.education_desc: Send course reminders, assignment alerts, results, and class updates instantly. Keep students engaged with automated reminders and support.
use_cases.healthcare_desc: Automate appointment reminders, post-visit follow-ups, medication reminders, and health tips to improve patient outcomes and reduce no-shows.
use_cases.retail_desc: Run flash sales, loyalty campaigns, and personalised offers via WhatsApp. Turn one-time buyers into loyal customers with targeted promotions.
use_cases.finance_desc: Send transaction alerts, KYC reminders, account updates, and fraud notifications securely and instantly via WhatsApp Cloud API.
